name: Epsilon (Actions)
description: Sync analytics events and user profile details to Epsilon

dtm_cid.description: Your Company ID. Contact Epsilon support for assistance.
dtm_cid.label: Company ID

dtm_cmagic.description: Company Magic. Contact Epsilon support for assistance.
dtm_cmagic.label: Company Magic

actions.name: Standard Fields Event
actions.description: Sync an event containing standard fields only to Epsilon

fields.label: Cache Buster
fields.description: Unique identifier for the message. Used for cache busting.

id.title: Cache Buster
id.description: Unique identifier for the message. Used for cache busting.

fields.label: App ID / Namespace
fields.description: The namespace of the Mobile App.

appId.title: App ID / Namespace
appId.description: The namespace of the Mobile App.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the event to send to Epsilon.

dtm_event.title: Event Name
dtm_event.description: The name of the event to send to Epsilon.

fields.label: App Version
fields.description: The version of the Mobile App.

version.title: App Version
version.description: The version of the Mobile App.

fields.label: Form ID
fields.description: Form ID used in Epsilon’s system to identify app visits vs. conversions.

dtm_fid.title: Form ID
dtm_fid.description: Form ID used in Epsilon’s system to identify app visits vs. conversions.

fields.label: Promo ID
fields.description: Promo ID used in Epsilon’s system to identify the promotion associated with the event.

dtm_promo_id.title: Promo ID
dtm_promo_id.description: Promo ID used in Epsilon’s system to identify the promotion associated with the event.

fields.label: Identifiers
fields.description: Unique identifiers for the user.

deviceID.title: Device ID
deviceID.description: Mobile Device ID (IDFV or Google App Set ID).

advertisingId.title: Advertising ID
advertisingId.description: Mobile Ad ID (IDFA or Google Add ID).

dtm_user_agent.title: User Agent
dtm_user_agent.description: User agent of the mobile device.

dtm_email_hash.title: Email address
dtm_email_hash.description: Accepts hashed or unhashed emails. Segment will ensure that a non hashed email is hashed before being sent to Epsilon

dtm_mobile_hash.title: Mobile Hash
dtm_mobile_hash.description: Accepts hashed or unhashed mobile numbers. Segment will ensure that a non hashed mobile number is hashed before being sent to Epsilon

fields.label: Device Type
fields.description: Type of the device (e.g., iOS, Android).

deviceType.title: Device Type
deviceType.description: Type of the device (e.g., iOS, Android).

fields.label: Department
fields.description: Department of the product.

fields.label: Category
fields.description: Category of the product.

fields.label: Sub Category
fields.description: Sub-category of the product.

fields.label: Product ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product

fields.label: Brand
fields.description: Brand of the product.

fields.label: Universal Product Code
fields.description: Manufacturer Universal Product Code for the product.

dtmc_upc.title: Universal Product Code
dtmc_upc.description: Manufacturer Universal Product Code for the product.

fields.label: Manufacturer Model Part Number
fields.description: Manufacturer Model Part Number for the product.

dtmc_mpn.title: Manufacturer Model Part Number
dtmc_mpn.description: Manufacturer Model Part Number for the product.

fields.label: Transaction ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the transaction.

fields.label: Conversion Value
fields.description: Contains the total purchase price in decimal format. Do not include any tax or shipping costs.

dtm_conv_val.title: Conversion Value
dtm_conv_val.description: Contains the total purchase price in decimal format. Do not include any tax or shipping costs.

fields.label: Items Purchased
fields.description: An array of all items in the conversion.

dtm_items.title: Items Purchased
dtm_items.description: An array of all items in the conversion.

product_id.title: Product ID
product_id.description: Unique identifier / SKU for the product.

item_amount.title: Item Amount
item_amount.description: Unit cost / price for 1 unit of the item.

item_quantity.title: Item Quantity
item_quantity.description: number of SKU items in the transaction.

item_discount.title: Item Discount
item_discount.description: Discount value from the original amount.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency of the transaction. Use ISO 4217 currency codes (e.g., USD, EUR).

dtm_conv_curr.title: Currency
dtm_conv_curr.description: Currency of the transaction. Use ISO 4217 currency codes (e.g., USD, EUR).

fields.label: Order Type
fields.description: Differentiate between types of online purchases (Delivery, Pickup, etc.)

dtmc_conv_type.title: Order Type
dtmc_conv_type.description: Differentiate between types of online purchases (Delivery, Pickup, etc.)

fields.label: Store Location
fields.description: For Pickup conversions, denote the store location of the pickup.

dtmc_conv_store_location.title: Store Location
dtmc_conv_store_location.description: For Pickup conversions, denote the store location of the pickup.

fields.label: Custom Event Name
fields.description: The name of the custom event to send to Epsilon.

customEventName.title: Custom Event Name
customEventName.description: The name of the custom event to send to Epsilon.

fields.label: Custom Properties
fields.description: Add custom properties to the event.

customProperties.title: Custom Properties
customProperties.description: Add custom properties to the event.
